div.p: Algorithm Complexity: $O(\log(N))$ per Query Probability Distribution: $P(level=L) = \lfloor -\ln(uniform()) \cdot m_L \rfloor$ Implementation Detail: Skip-list inspired multi-layered graph.

ul.li: Nodes at Level $L$ must exist at all levels $< L$.
Maximum degree $M_{max}$ is strictly enforced per layer (except $L0$ where $M_{max0} = 2M$).
Search performance relies on $efSearch$ (beam width) tuning.
